market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Cosmetics giant Rituals confirms data breach of customer membership records
articles.description: The cosmetics retailer, which counts 41 million customers in its membership data, declined to provide an accurate total number of customers affected.

articles.title: Bitcoin breaks Strategy's STRC ex-dividend date slump for the first time in six months
articles.description: Bitcoin is seeing a short squeeze dynamic and steady U.S. demand to support gains.

articles.title: Bitcoin tops $79,000 as crypto rally gathers steam; Circle, Coinbase, Strategy lead
articles.description: BTC pushed to an 11-week high with dynamics for a short squeeze building, one analyst noted.

articles.title: Cathie Woods’ ARK makes its first lead investment in startup Lucra — and it isn’t AI
articles.description: Lucra offers corporate loyalty programs reimagined as interactive eSports. But winning ARK as a lead wasn't easy.

articles.title: The London P2P sweep: UK FCA raids eight illegal peer-to-peer trading hubs
articles.description: The sites were targeted for facilitating P2P trading without required registration or anti-money laundering controls, posing a financial crime risk.

articles.title: Crypto giant GSR launches its first ETF to give investors an easy way to bet on the big 3 tokens
articles.description: GSR is entering the asset management space with a new Nasdaq-listed ETF that actively manages a basket of bitcoin, ether and solana while offering investors a chance to earn staking yields.

articles.title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
articles.description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.

articles.title: Lazarus-linked macOS malware hits crypto and fintech firms
articles.description: Security researchers linked a new “Mach-O Man” malware kit to a Lazarus campaign that uses fake meeting invites and ClickFix prompts to steal credentials and access corporate systems on macOS.

articles.title: 晶片戰再升級！美光遊說美國會通過更嚴格半導體設備出口中國法案
articles.description: 根據路透社的報導，美國記憶體晶片製造商美光（Micron）正積極推動美國國會通過新法案，以對中國競爭對手使用的 […]

articles.title: HIVE, Keel push deeper into AI data centers with capital raise, asset sale
articles.description: HIVE raises $115M to expand data centers while Keel exits Latin America, redirecting funds into HPC and AI as both stocks climb 4%.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Tax-free bitcoin is back: How UK investors can avoid paying duty on crypto investments once more
articles.description: Stratiphy will offer access to three ETNs provided by 21Shares: those covering bitcoin, ether and one combining BTC and gold.

articles.title: Binance.US cuts spot trading fees to near zero in push to undercut rivals
articles.description: The exchange set maker fees at 0% and taker fees at 0.02% across all pairs, extending near-zero pricing to all users with no volume tiers or subscription requirements.

articles.title: Esther and Anne Wojcicki join new  healthcare accelerator, fund
articles.description: Mary Minno launches early-stage startup accelerator program, Treehub, and an early-stage firm, AI Health Fund, aimed at backing startups working at the intersection of healthcare and AI.

articles.title: Aave deposits fall by $15B as Kelp exploit sparks flight from DeFi lender
articles.description: Aave’s supplied balance has tanked since the Kelp DAO bridge exploit, as users pull funds amid uncertainty over how much of the rsETH-linked shortfall the protocol will ultimately absorb.

articles.title: UK cracks down on illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading in nationwide raids
articles.description: The Financial Conduct Authority has raided eight locations suspected of illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading, issuing cease-and-desist orders.

articles.title: Europe’s MiCA regime puts smaller crypto firms under pressure
articles.description: Smaller crypto companies across Europe face mounting compliance costs as MiCA moves from framework to enforcement, raising fears of market consolidation.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) rises 5.5%, leading index higher
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP) up 5.3% from Tuesday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

articles.title: Russia advances crypto bill that could pave way for criminal penalties
articles.description: Russian lawmakers passed a first reading of a bill regulating crypto through licensed intermediaries, with key rules set to take effect in July 2026 and 2027.

articles.title: Amazon Music partners with Bandsintown for concert listings
articles.description: Users will be able to see live events of an artist on their Amazon Music profile.
